title: Harness and figure shoulder-wearable accessory
abstract: An apparatus configured for securing a 3-Dimensional figure in perpendicular position relative and over a user shoulder with a self-adjustable harness having anterior and posterior sides and a 3-Dimensional figure. The self-adjustable harness is configured to secure over first and second opposed shoulders on first and second lateral sides of the user, respectively, and allows the figure to lay on the user's shoulder in a parallel and perpendicular position to the user's head. The figure may also include at least one compartment within or below. The harness may include a plate through which the harness straps are inserted, optionally with a barcode printed on a plate for connecting to social network or a logo of the manufacturer, seller or user.
claims:
Claims 1. An apparatus configured for securing a 3-Dimensional figure in perpendicular position relative and over a user shoulder, said apparatus comprising: a self-adjustable harness having anterior and posterior sides; a 3 -Dimensional figure, wherein said self-adjustable harness is configured to secure over first and second opposed shoulders on first and second lateral sides of said user, respectively, allowing said figure to lay on said user's shoulder in a parallel and perpendicular position to the user's head. 2. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said 3-Dimensional figure further comprises at least one compartment integrally located within said figure. 3. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said 3 -Dimensional figure further comprises at least one compartment located under said figure and attached to said base of said figure. 4. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said self-adjustable harness comprises a connective crossover plate and two straps with fasteners. 5. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said figure is selected from toy, plush, doll, stuffed animal and any 3 -Dimensional object. 6. The apparatus according to claim 4, wherein said harness comprises: [i] anterior side of said straps attached to fasteners on one first end section and threaded to said fasteners on other end section for adjusting length of said straps; and [ii] posterior side position of said straps, said posterior side interconnecting and crossing over through a central connective plate and creating a loop of an infinity shape, wherein at least one strap of said harness is attached to a base of said figure, wherein said harness is positioned in both anterior and posterior sides of a user's torso. 7. The apparatus according to claim 6, wherein said straps extend over said user's shoulder from the anterior side to the posterior side of a user's back. 8. The apparatus according to claim 6, wherein said central connective plate comprises four slits located at perimeter of the said connective plate, said slits are configured to enable one strap to enter said connective plate say from first slit and exit said connective plate through diagonally located slit relative to said first slit and second strap to enter said connective plate second slit parallel said first slit and exit said connective plate through diagonally located slit relative to said second slit. 9. The apparatus according to claim 6, wherein said central connective plate is located proximate or adjacent the center of a user's back between said userâs shoulders. 10. The apparatus according to claim 7, wherein second end section of said straps further extend after said crossover through said connective plate under a user's armpits, and extend further and threaded to said fasteners in anterior side of body of said user. 11. The apparatus according to claim 7, wherein said straps interconnect and crossover a loop in an infinity shape is configured in the center of back of said user. 12. The apparatus according to claim 10, wherein balance of said second end section of said straps is threaded to said fasteners and overhang on both anterior sides of said user's torso and configured to accommodate changes in dimensions of said harness by at least one fastener. 13. The apparatus according to claim 12, wherein mutually cooperating fasteners are configured to accommodate said changes in dimensions of said harness. 14. The apparatus according to claim 2, wherein said compartments are secured storage units for personal belongings. 15. The apparatus according to claim 2, comprising up to three compartments configured for storing personal belongings, wherein: one compartment is an integral hollow of main body section of said figure and sized up to height and within possible capacity of said figure; 

 second compartment is placed in base of said figure and positioned between said figure and shoulder of said user; and third compartment located on external side of said figure. 16. The apparatus according to claim 14 or 15, wherein said compartments comprising closing means for interlocking or opening said compartments. 17. The apparatus according to claims 4 or 6, wherein said connective plate is configured for printing a barcode or QR, which are configured for visual scanning with a mobile communication device, or logo of manufacturer, owner or user of said apparatus. 18. The apparatus according to claim 17, wherein scanning said barcode or QR enable wireless communication to social networks through an application installed on said mobile communication device. 19. The apparatus according to claim 1, wherein said 3-Dimensional figure further comprises internal lighting within cavity of said figure, said lighting is visible through outer surface of said figure or selected transparent or partially transparent outer parts thereof. 20. The apparatus according to claim 19, wherein turn on and turn off switching control device of said internal lighting is activated by said user. 21. The apparatus according to claim 19, wherein turn on and turn off of said internal lighting is remotely controlled by wireless communication means. 22. The apparatus according to claim 20, wherein said wireless communication means operates within the range of electromagnetic radio frequency range, and adapted for.
